---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve and fix issues.
title: '🐛 [BUG]: <Short description of the bug>'
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior / Screenshots
What actually happened (include error logs, tracebacks, or screenshots if applicable).

## Environment Details
- OS: [e.g. Linux, macOS, Windows]
- Elixir version: [e.g. 1.19.0]
- Erlang/OTP version: [e.g. 26.0]
- Phoenix version: [e.g. 1.8.7]
- Browser (if UI issue): [e.g. Chrome, Firefox]

## Additional Context
Add any other context about the problem here.
